informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.text: We collect account information you voluntarily provide: email address and name. For credentials login, we collect your email and password. For OAuth login (Google/GitHub), we collect the email and name associated with your provider account. We also collect financial records you create in the app, such as transactions, categories, and receipts. We do not collect IP addresses, device information, or location data.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.text: We use your information to authenticate your identity, provide core features (dashboards, transactions, balances, reports), maintain security, improve the app, and comply with legal obligations.

thirdPartyServices.title: Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.text: We use the following third-party services: [MongoDB, Vercel/AWS for hosting, Google Provider, GitHub Provider]. These services may process your data according to their own privacy policies. OAuth providers (Google, GitHub) share only the information you have authorized.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. These cookies are required for you to log in and use the app. No tracking or analytics cookies are used unless you explicitly enable them. You can manage cookies in your browser settings, but disabling essential cookies will prevent you from logging in.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.text: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with: (1) service providers who help us operate the app (hosting, database), (2) OAuth providers (Google, GitHub) only when you choose to log in with them, and (3) legal authorities if required by law.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.text: We retain your account data while your account is active. You may request account deletion at any time. Some data may be retained longer to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, or enforce agreements.

security.title: Security
security.text: We use encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure authentication via NextAuth.js, and access controls to protect your data. Passwords are hashed and stored securely by your authentication provider. However, no system is 100% secure.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.text: Depending on your location (GDPR/CCPA), you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your data. You may also withdraw consent for data processing where applicable.

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.text: Your data may be stored on servers located outside your country. We use standard contractual clauses or equivalent safeguards to ensure adequate protection when transferring data internationally.

childrensPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrensPrivacy.text: Our service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us to request deletion.

changesToPolicy.title: Changes to This Policy
changesToPolicy.text: We will notify users of material changes to this policy via email or an in-app notice. Continued use of the app after changes means acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: For privacy questions or requests: drios9107@gmail.com.
